title: Tanker4726
summary:
Main
• Little Progress for MEG VLCCs as War Enters its Second Month - Over the past fortnight, VLCC activity originating from the Arabian Gulf has remained subdued, prompting the market to pivot its focus toward cargo loadings from Yanbu and the Gulf of Oman, where volumes have surged significantly above pre-conflict levels. While global attention remains fixed on the Strait of Hormuz, the extreme volatility of the situation precludes definitive short-term projections ; currently, transit through the straits is largely restricted, with activity primarily limited to Iranian-linked cargoes. Despite this regional instability, the broader VLCC market remains supported by substantial global oil arbitrage opportunities, a trend we expect to persist.
